title: Define Tab Properties
text: Define Tab Properties Assign the pages that comprise the tab widget when it appears in Microsoft Windows. For more information, see utab (Tab) . How to Setting Widget Properties Defining and Activating Tabs Related Links Widgets In Uniface, widgets are user interface controls. They can display data values, control how values are modified, and determine the appearance of those objects. Most widgets are field-level widgets. ValRep Lists and Ranges Fields have a ValRep property that can be used to define a limited range of possible values for that field. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
